text.title: EF Core Data Layer Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the EF data-layer manifest this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "dbcontext_name": "billing_db", "provider": "MariaDB", "entities": [], "asnotracking_audit": {"read_paths_pass": false}, "concurrency_audit": {"aggregates_have_token": false}, "audit_interceptor": {"registered": false}, "migration_sql_reviewed": false, "forbidden_patterns_found": ["IQueryable<Invoice> returned from InvoiceRepository.Query"] }
example.note: dbcontext_name not PascalCase + missing suffix; provider unsupported; no entities; AsNoTracking + concurrency audits failing; interceptor missing; SQL not reviewed.
